---
title: Chrome
output: 
    github_document:
        toc: true
        toc_depth: 4
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r knitr_config, include = FALSE}
source("_knitr_config.R")
```

******************************************************************************************

#### chromedriver

http://chromedriver.chromium.org/getting-started

* an executable that Selenium WebDriver uses to control Chrome  

* Selenium WebDriver is an automation framework that allows you to execute tests against different browsers

```sh
brew cask install chromedriver
```

******************************************************************************************

#### developer tools

`OPTION + CMD + I`

******************************************************************************************

#### xpath helper

https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/xpath-helper/hgimnogjllphhhkhlmebbmlgjoejdpjl
